title: teams — declared entitlements
description: Five entitlement keys. `team_slot` caps the number of teams per tenant (per hierarchy.md §7). `team_capacity_gating` toggles capacity + waitlist enforcement. `team_trials` gates the whole Trials sub-module. `team_event_participation` gates the whole EventTeams sub-module. `team_polymorphic_coach` gates `member_type='coach'` on TeamMember rows (blocked until Wave 2b Staff module lands with the Coach model).

entitlements.description: How many teams a tenant can have. Small: 10. Medium: 100. Enterprise: unlimited (null cap). Consumed on team create; released on soft-delete/archive.
enforcedBy: TeamObserver.deleted (soft-delete / archive) releases 1 unit via EntitlementGate::release('team_slot')

entitlements.description: Enforce Team.capacity + Team.capacity_waitlist when set. Default off on Small (capacity is a UI hint only). Medium + Enterprise default on. Overrideable per-tenant by ops (tenants running open-enrollment classes with waivers).
enforcedBy: TeamMemberObserver.creating skips the capacity check when this entitlement is off
CapacityGate::allowsAdditional() returns true unconditionally when off

entitlements.description: The whole Trials sub-module. Off = Trial CRUD returns 402 at the middleware. Small tenants cannot run trials — they add directly to the roster or don't at all.
enforcedBy: TrialObserver refuses create when the gate is closed
SDUI trial resource surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'teams.trials'

entitlements.description: The whole EventTeams sub-module. Off = EventTeam CRUD returns 402. Small tenants cannot register teams to events (their business shape doesn't include competitive participation).
enforcedBy: EventTeamObserver refuses create when the gate is closed
SDUI event-team resource surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'teams.event_participation'

entitlements.description: Enables member_type='coach' on TeamMember rows. Blocked until Wave 2b Staff module lands with the Coach model. Wave 2 ships with the entitlement key + observer wiring; Wave 2b flips the plan defaults to (medium: 1, enterprise: 1). Small stays 0 because coaches on Small are captured via member_type='user' + role_on_team='coach'.
enforcedBy: TeamMemberObserver.creating refuses when member_type='coach' AND this entitlement is off (returns POLYMORPHIC_COACH_NOT_ENTITLED 402)
